parsed.production_notes: The video features a human actor, but the dialogue appears dubbed, likely using AI-generated voices for both the learner and the tutor app. The conversational pacing is artificially tight, typical of simulated app interactions.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair styled in a messy bun and wears dark eyeliner.
characters.wardrobe: A loose-fitting brown t-shirt with a graphic print on the front.
characters.demeanor: Initially slightly frustrated or bored, transitioning to pleasantly surprised and engaged.

characters.appearance: Digital avatar of a woman with red hair and fair skin, visible only on a tablet screen.
characters.wardrobe: Not clearly visible, appears to be wearing a dark top.

scenes.setting: Modern kitchen, daytime. Props include dishes, a sponge, and a tablet. Color palette features white cabinets and dark countertops.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young blonde woman stands at a kitchen sink, washing dishes. She wears a brown t-shirt and has her hair pulled up in a messy bun. She holds a sponge in one hand and a white plate in the other, scrubbing it under running water. To her right, a tablet is propped up on the dark speckled countertop, displaying an image of a woman with red hair. The kitchen features white upper cabinets and a stainless steel sink. The lighting is bright and natural, illuminating the scene evenly. The woman frequently shifts her gaze between the dishes she is washing and the tablet screen.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman washing dishes while interacting with a language learning app on her tablet. Colorful speech bubbles containing Japanese text, romaji, and English translations overlay the footage, alternating between the learner and the app. A row of Japanese flags is displayed across the top of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 日本語が嫌いです。 [I hate Japanese.]
Character B says: お名前は何ですか？ [What's your name?]
Character A says: 私の名前はNeslyです。 [My name is Nesly.]
Character B says: お元気ですか？ [How are you?]
Character A says: 元気です、ありがとう。 [I am fine, thank you.]
Character B says: 何歳ですか？ [How old are you?]
Character A says: 私は24です。 [I am 24.]
Character B says: 「私は24です」と言わないで。 [Don't say "Watashi wa 24 desu."]
Character B says: 「私は24歳です」と言って。 [Say "Watashi wa 24-sai desu."]
Character A says: ああ、私は24歳です。 [Ah, I am 24 years old.]
Character B says: なぜ日本語が嫌いですか？ [Why do you hate Japanese?]
Character A says: 私はアネンプリオイドだから、日本語が下手です。 [I am jobless because of my bad Japanese.]
Character B says: 「アネンプリオイド」と言わないで。 [Don't say "anenupurioido."]
Character B says: 「無職」と言って。 [Say "mushoku."]
Character A says: ああ、私は無職です、日本語が下手だから。 [Ah, I am unemployed because of my bad Japanese.]
Character B says: ネイティブの発音に99%近いです。 [That was 99% in a native accent,]
Character B says: すごい！ [great job!]
Character A says: 毎日こうやって日本語を教えてもらえますか？ [Can you teach me Japanese like this every day?]
Character B says: Praktikaをダウンロードするだけです。 [Just download Praktika.]
Character B says: 毎日発音のミスを直して、一緒に練習します。 [I'll fix your pronunciation mistakes and practice speaking with you every day.]
Character A says: 今すぐPraktikaをダウンロードします。 [I'll download Praktika right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
日本語が嫌いです (Nihongo kirai. I hate Japanese.)
お名前は何ですか？ (Onamae wa nan desu ka? What's your name?)
私の名前はNeslyです (Watashi no namae wa Nesly desu. My name is Nesly.)
お元気ですか？ (Ogenki desu ka? How are you?)
元気です、ありがとう (Genki desu, arigatou. I am fine, thank you.)
何歳ですか？ (Nansai desu ka? How old are you?)
私は24です (Watashi wa 24 desu. I am 24.)
「私は24です」と言わないで。 ("Watashi wa 24 desu" to iwanaide. Don't say "Watashi wa 24 desu.")
「私は24歳です」と言って (Watashi wa 24-sai desu to itte. Say "Watashi wa 24-sai desu.")
私は24歳です (Watashi wa 24-sai desu. I am 24 years old.)
なぜ日本語が嫌いですか？ (Naze nihongo ga kirai desu ka? Why do you hate Japanese?)
私はアネンプリオイドだから、日本語が下手です (Watashi wa anenupurioido dakara, nihongo ga heta desu. I am jobless because of my bad Japanese.)
「アネンプリオイド」と言わないで。 (Anenupurioido to iwanaide. Don't say "anenupurioido.")
「無職」と言って ("Mushoku" to itte. Say "mushoku.")
私は無職です、日本語が下手だから (Watashi wa mushoku desu, nihongo ga heta dakara. I am unemployed because of my bad Japanese.)
ネイティブの発音に99%近いです (Neitibu no hatsuon ni 99% chikai desu. That was 99% in a native accent,)
すごい！ (Sugoi! great job!)
毎日こうやって日本語を教えてもらえますか？ (Mainichi kou yatte nihongo wo oshiete moraemasu ka? Can you teach me Japanese like this every day?)
Praktikaをダウンロードするだけです。 (Praktika wo daunrodo suru dake desu. Just download Praktika.)
毎日発音のミスを直して、一緒に練習します (Mainichi hatsuon no misu wo naoshite, issho ni renshuu shimasu. I'll fix your pronunciation mistakes and practice speaking with you every day.)
今すぐPraktikaをダウンロードします (Ima sugu Praktika wo daunrodo shimasu. I'll download Praktika right now.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A plain, light purple gradient background. There are no physical objects, characters, or distinct lighting sources present in the frame.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a digital end card featuring a light purple gradient background. The Praktika app logo is centered, with app store download badges positioned below it.
